item.title: 《金融时报》报道称，美国企业被拒绝退还特朗普非法征收的关税
item.description: 《金融时报》周五援引知情人士报道称，美国政府拒绝退还最高法院裁定为非法的关税。【原文：The U.S. ​government has ‌declined to ​refund ​tariffs the Supreme ⁠Court ​has ruled ​illegal, the Financial Times ​reported ​on Friday citing ‌people ⁠familiar with the ​matter.】

item.title: Marvell科技股价因多年人工智能芯片增长预期而上涨
item.description: Marvell Technology股价周五开盘前飙升近12%，投资者押注其人工智能定制芯片和互连技术需求将持续走强，此前该公司发布了乐观的长期预测。【原文：Marvell Technology shares surged nearly 12% before the opening bell on Friday as investors bet on strengthening demand for its AI-focused custom chips ​and interconnect technologies following an upbeat long-term forecast.】

item.title: 巴西航空工业公司预测2026年飞机交付量与营收将双双增长
item.description: 巴西飞机制造商巴西航空工业公司周五表示，预计2026年将交付80至85架商用飞机，高于去年的78架；而公务机交付量预计在160至170架之间，高于2025年的155架。【原文：Brazilian planemaker ​Embraer said on ‌Friday it expects to deliver 80 ​to 85 ​commercial aircraft in 2026, ⁠up from ​78 last year, ​while business jet deliveries were estimated between ​160 and ​170, versus 155 in 2025.】

item.title: 联合国粮农组织称，全球食品价格在2月份出现反弹
item.description: 联合国粮食及农业组织周五表示，全球食品价格在连续五个月下跌后，于二月份出现回升。谷物、肉类及多数植物油价格的上涨抵消了奶酪和糖价的下跌。【原文：World food prices rose in February after falling for five straight months, as higher cereal, meat and most vegetable oil prices outweighed ​declines in cheese and sugar, the United Nations' Food and Agriculture Organization ‌said on Friday.】

item.title: 印尼将限制16岁以下儿童使用社交媒体，部长称
item.description: 印度尼西亚通信和数字部周五宣布，将限制16岁以下儿童使用社交媒体平台，成为最新一个建立网络防护措施的国家，以减少沉迷和网络欺凌的风险。【原文：Indonesia will restrict access to social media platforms for children under 16, its communications and digital ministry said on Friday, making it the latest country to install online guardrails ​to reduce the risks of addiction and cyberbullying.】

item.title: 受中东冲突影响，全球股票基金八周来首次出现资金流出
item.description: 截至3月4日的七天内，全球投资者八周来首次削减股票基金持仓，因美以与伊朗冲突加剧引发通胀担忧，并抑制了风险偏好。【原文：Global investors trimmed their equity fund holdings for the first time in eight weeks in the seven days to March 4 as an ​intensifying U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran fanned inflation worries and dampened risk ‌appetite.】

item.title: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局称，福特因倒车影像问题将在美国召回174万辆汽车
item.description: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）周五表示，福特汽车因后视摄像头缺陷可能导致图像无法显示，从而降低驾驶员对车辆后方的视野，将在美国召回174万辆汽车。【原文：Ford is recalling 1.74 ​million vehicles in the ‌U.S. as a rearview camera defect may prevent images from displaying, reducing the driver's view ​behind the vehicle, the ​U.S. National Highway Traffic Safety ⁠Administration (NHTSA) said on Friday.】

item.title: Ceconomy监事会将于3月12日召开会议讨论后续举措，即将离任的首席执行官表示
item.description: 即将离任的Ceconomy首席执行官周五向路透社表示，这家德国电子产品零售商的监事会将于周四召开会议，商讨后续举措。【原文：The departing chief executive of Ceconomy told Reuters on ​Friday that the German electronics ‌retailer's supervisory board is set to meet on Thursday to discuss the ​next steps.】

item.title: 彭博社报道称，特朗普政府官员目前排除财政部参与石油期货交易的可能性
item.description: 彭博新闻社周五援引知情人士消息报道称，特朗普政府目前已排除动用财政部进行石油期货交易的可能性。【原文：The Trump administration is ruling ​out deploying the Treasury Department to trade oil futures ‌for now, Bloomberg News reported on Friday, citing a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 2月印度IT股遭遇外资流出，创7个月新高，人工智能冲击波蔓延
item.description: 2月份，因担忧人工智能引发的颠覆可能挤压盈利，印度信息技术股的外资流出量达到七个月高点。【原文：Foreign outflows from India's information technology stocks hit a seven-month high in February, on worries that artificial intelligence-led disruption could squeeze earnings.】

item.title: 经重组后裁减19%员工，Atos达成年度营收目标
item.description: 法国IT服务公司安托斯周五公布的全年营收略高于80亿欧元（约合93亿美元），达成既定目标，反映出该公司经过重大财务重组后业务转型取得进展。【原文：French IT services company Atos reported full-year revenue slightly above 8 billion euros ($9.3 billion) on Friday, ​meeting its target and reflecting progress in ‌its turnaround following significant financial restructuring.】

item.title: 印度科技大州卡纳塔克邦禁止16岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
item.description: 印度南部卡纳塔克邦首席部长西达拉马亚周五宣布，该邦已禁止16岁以下青少年使用社交媒体。卡纳塔克邦是印度科技中心班加罗尔的所在地，此举使该邦成为印度首个实施此类禁令的地区。【原文：The southern Indian state ​of Karnataka, home to ‌the tech hub of Bengaluru, has banned ​the use of ​social media by those under ⁠the age of ​16, state Chief Minister ​Siddaramaiah said on Friday, becoming the first in India ​to do so.】

item.title: 恩智浦半导体中国公司表示，在大量账户被禁用后，大部分业务已恢复运营。
item.description: 荷兰芯片制造商恩智浦半导体（Nexperia）的中国子公司周五表示，在该公司大规模停用中国境内所有员工的办公账户导致业务"严重"中断后，其在华大部分业务已恢复运营。【原文：Dutch chipmaker Nexperia's Chinese ​subsidiary said on ‌Friday most of the company's operations ​in China ​have resumed after being "significantly" ⁠disrupted following ​Nexperia's mass disabling of ​office accounts for all employees in the ​country.】

item.title: 汉莎航空公布2025年超预期营业利润，2026年前景因中东局势不明朗
item.description: 汉莎航空周五公布的2025财年业绩好于预期，得益于更严格的财务管理和机队更新策略，公司成功控制成本并实现利润最大化。【原文：Lufthansa on Friday reported better results for its ​2025 financial year than expected as ‌stricter financial management and fleet turnover helped it manage costs and maximise profits.】

item.title: 消息人士称，中东出口量骤降，亚洲正努力寻找燃料油
item.description: 亚洲燃料油贸易商正竭力寻求替代供应，因伊朗战争导致关键中东供应商经霍尔木兹海峡的运输受阻，迫使他们转向西方寻求替代货源。【原文：Fuel oil traders in Asia are struggling to secure alternative ​supply as the Iran war curtails shipments from key Middle Eastern suppliers through the Strait of Hormuz, prompting them to look to ‌the West for replacement cargoes.】

item.title: 中国批准辉瑞GLP-1药物用于体重管理
item.description: 辉瑞公司周五在微信上宣布，中国已批准其GLP-1药物赛维英用于超重或肥胖成年人的长期体重管理。此举将加剧该市场的竞争，分析师预计未来几年该市场价值将达数十亿美元。【原文：China has approved Pfizer's GLP-1 treatment Xianweiying for long-term weight ​management in overweight or obese adults, the ‌US drugmaker said on WeChat on Friday, boosting competition in a market analysts expect to be worth billions in ​coming years.】

item.title: 早盘行情：中东动荡令市场陷入混乱
item.description: 瑞薇带您展望欧洲及全球市场今日走势【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Rae Wee】

item.title: 《金融时报》称依视路创始人之子即将达成协议收购兄弟姐妹持有的德尔芬股份
item.description: 莱昂纳多·玛丽亚·德尔维基奥即将达成协议，从家族控股公司德尔芬手中收购其两名兄弟的股份。德尔芬控股公司掌控着依视路陆逊梯卡集团。这位继承人在周五发表的《金融时报》专访中透露了这一消息。【原文：Leonardo Maria del Vecchio is nearing a deal to buy out two of his ​siblings from the family holding company Delfin, which controls ‌EssilorLuxottica , the heir told the Financial Times in an interview published on Friday.】

item.title: 独家：美国法官将就特朗普关税退款问题举行闭门"和解会议"
item.description: 美国一名法官将于周五与政府律师举行闭门会议，旨在敲定退还高达1750亿美元非法征收关税的程序。法院官员将此次会议称为"和解会议"。【原文：A U.S. judge will meet behind closed doors with government lawyers on Friday seeking to hammer out a process to refund up to $175 billion in illegally ​collected tariffs, a meeting a court official described as a "settlement conference."】

item.title: 预计2月美国就业增长放缓；失业率料维持在4.3%不变
item.description: 美国2月份就业增长可能有所放缓，医疗保健行业招聘在1月份大幅增长后预计将回归正常趋势，但失业率预计仍将保持在4.3%的水平。【原文：U.S. job growth likely cooled in February, with hiring in the healthcare sector expected to return to normal trends after an outsized increase in January, but the unemployment rate is anticipated to have remained steady at 4.3%.】

item.title: 中国、印度引领对中东数十亿美元汽车出口
item.description: 美国与以色列对伊朗的战争已进入第七天，这场冲突可能扰乱从亚洲向中东地区运送汽车的物流链条——中东是亚洲汽车制造商的重要出口市场。【原文：The U.S.-Israel war with Iran, which entered its seventh day on Friday, threatens to disrupt the shipment of vehicles from Asia to the Middle East, a major export market for Asian automakers.】

item.title: 据彭博社报道，软银寻求高达400亿美元贷款以资助对OpenAI的投资
item.description: 据彭博社记者周五在X平台发文称，软银正寻求最高400亿美元的贷款，主要用于为其对ChatGPT开发商OpenAI的投资提供资金。【原文：SoftBank is ​seeking ‌a loan of ​up ​to $40 billion, ⁠primarily ​to finance ​its investment in ​ChatGPT-maker ​OpenAI, a Bloomberg ‌News ⁠reporter said in ​an ​X ⁠post on ​Friday.】

item.title: 独家：尽管美国发出警告，越南仍计划与中国科技公司达成新的5G协议，消息人士称
item.description: 知情人士透露，越南警方控股的电信运营商Mobifone正与中国科技公司商谈新合同，计划由中方承建其5G网络部分建设项目。此前美国曾就相关交易提出安全风险警告，但该计划仍在推进中。【原文：Vietnam's police-owned telecom operator Mobifone is in talks with Chinese tech ​firms over new contracts to build parts of its 5G network, three people briefed on the plan said, despite U.S. warnings of ‌security risks following earlier deals.】

item.title: 富士康表示伊朗冲突迄今影响有限
item.description: 全球最大电子制造商富士康董事长周五表示，美国和以色列与伊朗的冲突对富士康的影响有限。富士康同时也是英伟达关键的人工智能服务器制造商。【原文：The U.S. ​and Israeli conflict ‌with Iran is having limited impact ​on Foxconn , the ​chairman of the world's ⁠largest electronics ​maker and Nvidia's key ​AI server maker said on Friday.】

item.title: 油价下跌，因美国可能干预期货市场，并为俄罗斯石油采购颁发豁免令
item.description: 油价六天来首次下跌，因美国政府正考虑可能干预期货市场以抑制油价上涨，并已批准印度炼油商购买俄罗斯原油，以缓解中东战争造成的供应紧张。【原文：Oil fell for the first time in six days as the U.S. government is considering potentially intervening in the futures market to blunt rising ​prices and has given waivers to Indian refiners to buy Russian crude to ‌ease supply constraints from the Middle East war.】

item.title: 海湾航空公司恢复有限航班，但导弹袭击加剧不确定性
item.description: 阿联酋航空和阿提哈德航空周五从其阿联酋枢纽机场恢复了飞往全球主要城市的有限航班，但持续存在的导弹威胁给航空公司带来了巨大压力，迫使它们争分夺秒地安排旅客行程。【原文：Emirates and Etihad Airways were resuming limited flight schedules to key global cities from their United Arab Emirates ​hubs on Friday, though the ongoing threat of missile fire piled pressure on airlines as they scramble to accommodate travellers.】

item.title: 股市面临艰难一周，中东战火持续，油价有望大幅上涨
item.description: 亚洲股市周五下跌，正朝着六年内最大单周跌幅迈进，而油价则有望创下三年来最大涨幅。全球市场经历动荡一周，中东冲突未见缓和迹象。【原文：Asia stocks fell on Friday and were headed for their sharpest weekly drop in six years while oil prices were poised for their biggest jump in three ​in a turbulent week for global markets as the conflict in the Middle East showed few signs of easing.】

item.title: 美元料创一年来最大单周涨幅，伊朗危机推升避险需求
item.description: 周五亚洲早盘时段，美元汇率基本持稳，并有望创下逾一年来最大单周涨幅，因中东局势升级推升了避险资产需求。【原文：The U.S. dollar held broadly steady in early Asian trade on Friday and was poised for its steepest weekly gain ​in more than a year as the escalating conflict in the Middle East drove demand for safe-haven assets.】

item.title: 美国国防部告知Anthropic公司其存在供应链风险，该公司首席执行官如是说。
item.description: 美国国防部已告知Anthropic公司，该人工智能实验室存在供应链风险，Anthropic首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代周四表示。【原文：The U.S. defense department has informed ​Anthropic that the ‌Artificial Intelligence lab is a supply chain ​risk, Anthropic CEO ​Dario Amodei said on ⁠Thursday.】

item.title: 英国上议院委员会称，英国应支持人工智能培训的"许可优先"策略
item.description: 英国议会上院一个委员会周五表示，英国应拒绝任何允许人工智能公司自由开采受版权保护材料用于商业模型训练的举措，转而采用许可优先制度。【原文：Britain should reject any move to let artificial intelligence ‌companies freely mine copyrighted material for commercial model training and instead adopt a licensing-first regime, a committee in the upper house of parliament said on Friday.】
